title: Radermachera fragrans
taxonomy: Radermachera fragrans is classified within the family Bignoniaceae. This plant belongs to the order Lamiales, which is a large and diverse group of flowering plants. The family Bignoniaceae, also known as the bignonia family, includes over 800 species of flowering plants. The order Lamiales encompasses more than 23,000 species, ranging from herbaceous plants to trees. Radermachera fragrans is native to tropical Asia, where it is often cultivated for its fragrant flowers.
